package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for bytes_count_gt_zero_contains: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `bytes.Count(...) > 0` instead of `bytes.Contains(...)`.
type CaseBytesCountGtZeroContainsDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseBytesCountGtZeroContainsModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseBytesCountGtZeroContainsRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseBytesCountGtZeroContainsModel
}

type CaseBytesCountGtZeroContainsService struct {
    repo *CaseBytesCountGtZeroContainsRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseBytesCountGtZeroContainsAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveBytesCountGtZeroContains(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseBytesCountGtZeroContainsDTO) error {
    focus := "bytes_count_gt_zero_contains"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    _ = bytes.Count(buf, []byte(",")) > 0
    bytes_count_gt_zero_contains_positive := map[string]int{"bytes": 1, "count": 2, "gt": 3, "zero": 4, "contains": 5}
    bytes_count_gt_zero_contains_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    bytes_positive_0 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = bytes_positive_0
    count_positive_1 := bytes_count_gt_zero_contains_positive["count"] + len(input)
    _ = count_positive_1
    gt_positive_2 := bytes_count_gt_zero_contains_positive["gt"] + len(input)
    _ = gt_positive_2
    zero_positive_3 := bytes_count_gt_zero_contains_positive["zero"] + len(input)
    _ = zero_positive_3
    contains_positive_4 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = contains_positive_4
    return nil
}
